summary: Comprehensive testing of Daily Ritual Builder feature completed successfully. Backend APIs 100% functional (6/6 ritual-specific tests passed). Frontend UI excellent with all template cards, ritual player, navigation, and authentication working perfectly.
passed_tests: GET /api/rituals/templates returns 4 ritual templates (Morning Awakening, Evening Unwind, Midday Energy Boost, Deep Consciousness)
POST /api/rituals creates custom ritual with authentication
GET /api/rituals returns user's saved rituals with authentication
DELETE /api/rituals/{id} deletes ritual with authentication
POST /api/rituals/{id}/complete marks ritual as completed with authentication
GET /api/rituals/history returns completion history with streak/stats
Rituals page (/rituals) loads with correct title 'Ritual Builder'
Templates tab shows all 4 template cards with correct names and descriptions
Each template card displays name, time of day, steps with badges, duration, and Start Now button
Clicking 'Start Now' opens ritual player with step-by-step timer interface
Ritual player shows current step, timer countdown, progress bar, play/pause and skip controls
Ritual player play button starts timer countdown successfully
Ritual player skip button advances to next step
Ritual player close button returns to rituals page
My Rituals tab accessible and shows appropriate content
History tab accessible and shows appropriate content
Navigation bar includes Rituals link and works correctly
Landing page includes Daily Rituals feature card with correct content
Dashboard quick actions include Rituals button that navigates correctly
Authentication flow works with test credentials (ritual@test.com)
Create Ritual button appears after successful authentication
All tabs (Templates, My Rituals, History) function correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (6/6 ritual-specific tests passed, 17/18 total tests passed)
